name: atlas
description: Capture, review, search, and advance local Atlas open loops from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Local memory and action capture for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Atlas connects Codex to a local review-first memory and action service. Capture ideas and open loops, see today's focus, search local evidence, and review candidates without paid APIs or cloud hosting.
defaultPrompt: Use Atlas to capture this as a reviewed local item.
Show my Atlas focus for today.
Search Atlas and include the supporting sources.
